replies.msg: 自己 阿媽都有煮 係口痕想食外賣

My friend Celine is on her period so she can't have cold drinks, coffee, ice cream and tomatoes right now. Her aunt flow is visiting. She has bad cramps right now so she's taken a day of menstrual leave. Her sister also feels bloated which means her period is going to come soon. She's had really painful stomach cramps recently too but her period is late this month; it's one week late. Today, she's being very emotional because it's that time of the month again. Her cousin Shirley missed her period so she might be pregnant. Her cousin's husband did his leg workout this afternoon in which he overtrained his legs so he's got cramp in his leg and left foot. Celine's brother will be attending a party over the weekend but I won't be going to ig with him in case of cramping his style. I don't wanna put any pressure on him that would cramp his style. I don't want him to be under pressure which would cramp his style.

quote.msg: 叫外賣咋 毒撚冇人約

replies.msg: Cramp somebody's style means prevent somebody from having a good time or from acting naturally or freely. It means someone or something's presence or existence restricts their behavior in some way. It means make them feel that they cannot behave in the way they want.
